creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Erik Jensen from comment #0)

Hello Erik!

I've noticed that dependency databases/xrootd is in need of an update because 4x version is deprecated and it not build with OpenSSL3 resulting in build dependency failure on 15 and 14.

I will start working on it and when I create a PR I will let you know so you can do a test run.

Cheers
